description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a low wall and featuring a spacious front yard with palm trees and a paved driveway. The house has large rectangular windows, a balcony above the main entrance, and a flat roof. The backyard includes a garden area with lush greenery, a gazebo, and decorative trees, providing ample outdoor living space. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, complemented by white window frames and doors. Multiple vehicles are parked in the driveway, indicating a residential setting. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor areas and natural light.
description: A modern, single-story beige house with large windows, a flat roof, and landscaped front and back yards featuring palm trees and a gazebo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, large windows, driveway, and palm trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked cars, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a gazebo, lush greenery, and large glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Side/rear view emphasizing the backyard landscaping, gazebo, and the flat roofline of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a balcony above, wide steps, and a paved approach flanked by palm trees
